channel.title: Naked Capitalism Daily Links
channel.description: Daily Links from nakedcapitalism.com, converted to audio.
channel.itunes:author: Naked Capitalism (TTS)

item.title: Links 4/30/2026
item.description: Daily Links from Naked Capitalism. 12 articles: Do memories form on a blank slate?; ‘Speed running’ Scientology: TikTok trend causes havoc, church alleges ‘hate crimes’; European State of the Climate 2025: record heatwaves from the Mediterranean to the Arctic, while glaciers shrink and snow cover declines; Poleward migration of warm Circumpolar Deep Water towards Antarctica; We Are Bombarding America’s Forests With Roundup…

item.title: Links 4/28/2026
item.description: Daily Links from Naked Capitalism. 15 articles: This tiny mammal survived the dinosaur apocalypse and changed life on Earth; DNA research just rewrote the origin of human species; ‘A remarkable time capsule’: The enchanting history of Oxford University’s 750-year-old medieval library; The Next ‘Forever Chemical’ May Already Be in the Air. Scientists Still Don’t Understand What It Could Do; An El Nino forecast pointing to the strongest event in decades is raising concerns about global crop production as farmers also face supply disruptions linked to the Iran war…

item.title: Links 4/27/2026
item.description: Daily Links from Naked Capitalism. 11 articles: California cities seek to bless polyamorous unions. Lawyers warn it will get messy in court; War, El Niño, Pestilence, and Famine: The Coming Shock to Global Food Supplies; I developed Long COVID while practicing medicine. The system had no place for me.; A Chinese-Style Kill Line?; How China’s young workers are securing their future even as AI disrupts job market, triggers pay cuts…
